alt: Plate of Peruvian ceviche on turquoise ceramic — lime-cured white fish with red onion and cilantro topped by a slice of red ají chili, served with choclo corn, orange sweet potato slices, toasted corn, and fried fish chunks, with a hand reaching in with a fork from above
description: Traditional Peruvian ceviche plated with all the canonical accompaniments: white fish cured in lime juice (leche de tigre), red onion, cilantro, and a slice of red ají chili on top — served with choclo (large-kernel Andean corn), camote (sweet potato), cancha (toasted corn), and chicharrón de pescado.
title: Gourmet Peruvian Ceviche with Fried Seafood
